_mode: la_sprawl: seed-res lightmap -> streamed probe seed; adaptive brick probes.
_probes: DENSE frozen probes: 32m bricks (~263k). Converge over ~200 warmup ticks then freeze (zero runtime cost), so density is free.
_freeze: bake-and-freeze: trace ~48 ticks to convergence, then stop dispatching (static sun/world). Zero per-frame GI cost after.
